nodes.label: SUMMARY.md
nodes.description: Project research summary consolidating stack decisions, 31 active requirements, architecture approach (3-process model), critical pitfalls, and phase-ordered roadmap

nodes.label: Three-Process Architecture
nodes.description: Renderer (Electron+Chromium+React 19) for UI only, Main process (Node 24/TS) for IPC/filesystem/HTTP/chain runner/JVM supervisor, JVM helper (Java 21) for JavaParser/JDBC/DTO schema. JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio between main and helper.
